_note: Product context injected into the content generator at build time. Populate via the Brand Setup tab or edit directly. Leave fields empty/null if unknown — do not invent. product_name is a placeholder pending rename (see naming brief, 2026-06-19) — update when locked.
one_liner: Your design system knows how to render. MODE teaches it why.
features: Semantic resolution engine — components resolve behavior across four dimensions: archetype, funnel stage, intent state, and context mode
IA planner — brief to full page architecture in seconds, powered by Claude Opus
Multi-variant generation — one brief produces Mover, Validator, and Explorer variants in parallel
Palette map — visual emphasis resolves per component per funnel stage, no manual assignment
Behavioral tokens — copy density, evidence requirements, and CTA rules driven by archetype
Component manifest — 11 components fully specified with zone affinity, slot schemas, and usage intent
Token dashboard — editable palette map, accent configuration, and preset switching, synced to your repo
Three presets out of the box — funnel-driven, archetype-driven, and feature-emphasis
Next.js preview UI — renders agent output instantly with palette and label overlays
Bring your own Anthropic API key — you own the token spend, no vendor billing

tiers.name: MODE
tiers.description: Hosted control plane for intent-aware page generation. Build, preview, and deploy semantic pages across your full funnel — from a shared dashboard your whole team uses. The deployed site never calls MODE at runtime.
features: Semantic resolution engine with four dimension model
Component manifest — 11 components, fully specified
Three palette presets — funnel-driven, archetype-driven, feature-emphasis
IA planner + multi-variant generation agent
Token dashboard with editable palette map
Studio canvas with live component and palette editing
Git-sync deploy — no runtime dependency on this product
Bring your own Anthropic API key

tiers.name: MODE Team
tiers.description: Multi-seat access, component adapter library, and usage dashboard. Coming soon.
features: Everything in MODE
Team accounts and shared workspaces
Usage dashboard
shadcn, Tailwind UI, and Radix Themes adapters
Priority support

named_links._note: Named link tokens for the slot editor — appear as selectable shortcuts in CTA href fields. Add any destination the site links to.

differentiators: Semantic intent layer — components resolve behavior across archetype, funnel stage, and context mode
No manual variants — the system makes the right call by default
Own what ships, rent what thinks — the rendered site syncs from the intelligence layer via your repo and never depends on it at runtime
Built on Radix UI — zero new primitives to learn
Palette map — visual emphasis accumulates semantically toward conversion
Simple setup — running in under an hour, configured once
Full ownership of the live site — config and resolution logic sync to your repo, fork and extend freely
Extensible — swap presets, extend the manifest, adapt to your stack
